data.content:
Migration complete. Here's a summary of the changes:

**`TestProject.csproj`** — Replaced v2 packages (`xunit`, `xunit.runner.visualstudio`, `Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk`) with `xunit.v3` 3.2.2 and added `<OutputType>Exe</OutputType>` (v3 uses a built-in runner).

**`OrderedTests.cs`** — `[TestCaseOrderer("MyApp.Tests.AlphabeticalOrderer", "TestProject")]` → `[TestCaseOrderer(typeof(AlphabeticalOrderer))]` (v3 replaced string-based type references with `typeof()`).

**`CustomCollectionFixture.cs`** — `[assembly: CollectionBehavior("...", "...")]` → `[assembly: CollectionBehavior(typeof(...))]` (same string→typeof migration).

**`AlphabeticalOrderer.cs`** *(new)* — Created the orderer implementation since `typeof()` requires a compile-time type (v2's string references didn't).

**`global.json`** — Removed the `"test": { "runner": "VSTest" }` config (v3 uses Microsoft.Testing.Platform by default).
